zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelaide de Saint-Pol於大約1130年出生在法國阿托斯時，她的父親Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin57歲，母親Beatrix de St.Pol34歲。她於大約1151年與Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre在法國結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1175年之後在法國。

zh-hans.Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France,: 法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯貝圖內

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adelaide de Saint-Pol于大约1130年出生在法国阿托斯时，她的父亲Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin57岁，母亲Beatrix de St.Pol34岁。她于大约1151年与Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre在法国结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1175年之后在法国。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Adelaide
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin (via French Adélaïde ), from adal ‘noble’ + heid ‘kind, sort’. It was borne in the 10th century by the wife of the Holy Roman Emperor Otto the Great. She became regent after his death and was revered as a saint. The given name increased in popularity in England during the 19th century, when it was borne by the wife of King William IV; she was the daughter of the ruler of the German duchy of Saxe-Meiningen. The Australian city of Adelaide was named in her honour.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelaide de Saint-Pol was born about 1130, in Artois, France, her father, Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin, was 57 and her mother, Beatrix de St.Pol, was 34. She married Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre about 1151, in France. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. She died after 1175, in France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelaide de Saint-Pol est née environ 1130, à Artois, France, son père, Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Beatrix de St.Pol, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre environ 1151, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée après 1175, à France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adelaide de Saint-Pol um 1130 in Artois, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin 57 und ihre Mutter Beatrix de St.Pol 34. Sie hat um 1151 in Frankreich Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1175 in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adelaide de Saint-Pol è nata il circa 1130 nel Artois, Francia, sua padre, Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin, aveva 57 anni e sua madre, Beatrix de St.Pol, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre circa 1151, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il 1175, nel Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Adelaide de Saint-Polが約1130年にフランスアルトイスで生まれた時，父Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdinは57歳，母Beatrix de St.Polは34歳であった。約1151年にフランスでRobert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1175年以後にフランスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adelaide de Saint-Pol(이)가 대략 1130년 프랑스 아토이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin(은)는 57세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrix de St.Pol(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 대략 1151년 프랑스에서 Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1175년 이후 프랑스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adelaide de Saint-Pol nasceu aproximadamente 1130, em Artois, França, seu pai, Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix de St.Pol, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre aproximadamente 1151, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1175, em França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelaide de Saint-Pol родилась около 1130 г. в местности артоис, Франция, её отцу по имени Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrix de St.Pol, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre около 1151 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла после 1175 г. в местности Франция.

sm.about 1130–after 1175: e tusa o le 1130–ina ua ma'ea le 1175

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adelaide de Saint-Pol nació aproximadamente 1130, en Artois, Francia, su papá, Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin, tenía 57 años y su mamá, Beatrix de St.Pol, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre aproximadamente 1151, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió después de 1175, en Francia.
